v0.12.1.release_notes:
Please report all bugs in our [Discord server](https://slimevr.dev/discord) for now in the appropriate development channels (`#server`, `#gui`, `#autobone`, etc.). If you need tech support or are not sure if you did find a bug, please use the `#support-forum`.

## Use the installer to install or update!
Use the installer to install or update SlimeVR if you're on Windows. You can find it here:
* Windows web installer: https://github.com/SlimeVR/SlimeVR-Installer/releases/latest/download/slimevr_web_installer.exe
* To run SlimeVR, use the shortcut from the start menu or desktop, or open the installation folder and launch slimevr.exe.

### Flatpak distribution for Linux
Now you can install [SlimeVR from Flathub](https://flathub.org/apps/details/dev.slimevr.SlimeVR) and update it through there. You can install it by running: ``flatpak install flathub dev.slimevr.SlimeVR``

## What's Changed
* UDPPacket23RotationAndAcceleration: Switch x and y around to adjust for different axes by @9il in https://github.com/SlimeVR/SlimeVR-Server/pull/1007
* Add more compact bundle protocol by @9il in https://github.com/SlimeVR/SlimeVR-Server/pull/999
* Change usb enumeration to only specific Vid/Pid by @sctanf in https://github.com/SlimeVR/SlimeVR-Server/pull/1012
* Fix the HID decoding, replace Q14 with Q15, optimize by @9il in https://github.com/SlimeVR/SlimeVR-Server/pull/1000
* don't toggle trackers if tracking is paused by @Louka3000 in https://github.com/SlimeVR/SlimeVR-Server/pull/1013
* GUI - Fix condition for promise detection in a11y by @ZycaR in https://github.com/SlimeVR/SlimeVR-Server/pull/1016
* fix macOS bundling action by @ImUrX in https://github.com/SlimeVR/SlimeVR-Server/pull/1015

## New Contributors
* @ZycaR made their first contribution in https://github.com/SlimeVR/SlimeVR-Server/pull/1016

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SlimeVR/SlimeVR-Server/compare/v0.12.0...v0.12.1

## Use the installer to install or update!
Use the installer to install or update SlimeVR if you're on Windows. You can find it here:

Now you can install [SlimeVR from Flathub](https://flathub.org/apps/details/dev.slimevr.SlimeVR) and update it through there. You can install it by running: ``flatpak install flathub dev.slimevr.SlimeVR``

## Use the installer to install or update!
Use the installer to install or update SlimeVR if you're on Windows. You can find it here:
* Windows web installer: https://github.com/SlimeVR/SlimeVR-Installer/releases/latest/download/slimevr_web_installer.exe
* To run SlimeVR, use the shortcut from the start menu or desktop, or open the installation folder and launch slimevr.exe.

### Flatpak distribution for Linux
Now you can install [SlimeVR from Flathub](https://flathub.org/apps/details/dev.slimevr.SlimeVR) and update it through there. You can install it by running: `flatpak install flathub dev.slimevr.SlimeVR`

- Feet mounting reset keybind
- Fix unassigned HMD flightlist step never showing
